message:
fix(pages): exclusion recount now respects active SummaryFilters

The recalculate_with_exclusions() path was querying all conversations
unconditionally (SELECT ... FROM conversations) without applying the
active SummaryFilters (agent, since_ts, etc.), causing exclusion recounts
to inflate totals when filters were in effect.

Changes:
- Added filters parameter to recalculate_with_exclusions() signature
- Calls build_filter_clause(filters) to generate WHERE clause + params
- Passes parameterized query to stmt.query_map via rusqlite::params_from_iter
- Updated call site in generate_with_exclusions() to forward filters

Test added:
- test_exclusion_recount_respects_active_filters: applies agent + since_ts
  filters to restrict to 1 conversation / 3 messages, then runs exclusion
  recount with a non-matching pattern and verifies counts are preserved
  rather than inflated to the full unfiltered dataset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
